query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `knowledgeBaseTypes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `parentTypeId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `knowledgeBaseTypes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `knowledgeBaseComponents` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `knowledgeBaseComponents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `knowledgeBaseCodeConfig` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `prefix` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'KB',
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `knowledgeBaseCodeConfig_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `knowledgeBase` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `typeId` int,
  `componentId` int,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `knowledgeBase_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
